mapper.select: SELECT ci.id, ci.product_id, ci.sku_id, ci.quantity, ci.selected, p.name AS product_name, p.main_image AS product_image, p.status AS product_status, p.total_stock, ps.name AS sku_name, ps.stock AS sku_stock, ps.price AS sku_price, COALESCE(ps.price, p.price) AS price, COALESCE(ps.stock, p.total_stock) AS stock, CASE WHEN p.status != 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_offline FROM cart_item ci LEFT JOIN product p ON ci.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_sku ps ON ci.sku_id = ps.id WHERE ci.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ci.created_at DESC
